text: Hello. Can you hear me? I'm Ethan from Nova Healthcare, Pennsylvania. I'm reaching out regarding a cashback benefit that can help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. To see if you qualify for this, please confirm with a yes or no if you're under the age of 65. For a subscriber to the service, press the star key now.
